documents.title: Form 278T Transaction Report
documents.summary: Discloses securities transactions for Director of OSTP. Reports sale and purchase of various equity positions including tech and financial sector holdings.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Sets ethics commitments for OSTP Director role including recusal from matters involving former employers and divestiture/recusal from certain securities holdings.

documents.title: Nominee Form 278
documents.summary: Comprehensive financial disclosure listing substantial holdings in technology equities, real estate investments, and retirement accounts. Largest concentrations in growth-stage tech companies and index funds.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Not independently verified via ProPublica cross-check
